summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Shortlet Property Scoring System. All 16 backend pytest cases passed (schema, CRUD, tier classification, override rule, search, filter, stats). Full frontend e2e flow passed: dashboard load, stat cards, filters, multi-step new evaluation form (info validation, 8 category steps with sub-factor scoring, live score updating, review step, submit), result page (final score, tier badge, radar chart, sub-factor table, print button), and dashboard search/filter integration.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' from recharts ResponsiveContainer during initial mount. Chart still renders correctly after layout settles, but the warning suggests the parent container may briefly have 0 dimensions on first render. Non-blocking but worth setting an explicit minHeight on the wrapper div.

action_items: Optional: silence recharts ResponsiveContainer width(-1)/height(-1) warning on EvaluationResult page by adding minWidth/minHeight or fixed dimensions to the chart wrapper.
critical_code_review_comments: Override rule, tier thresholds, and weighted score math in compute_score (server.py L122-188) match the frontend computeLocal in scoring.js — schemas are in sync (8 categories, 26 sub-factors, identical IDs and weights).
MongoDB _id correctly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} on every read.
All endpoints under /api prefix; CORS configured from env; URLs come from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL on frontend — env hygiene is good.
Pydantic validation in place; 400 returned for missing name/location; 404 for unknown evaluation id.
Minor: PUT /api/evaluations/{id} accepts partial update but if scores omitted, total_score/tier/etc remain stale (correct since not recomputed). Acceptable.
Minor: scores dict is not validated for missing sub-factor IDs — missing keys default to 0 in compute_score, which silently lowers the total. Acceptable for partial drafts but consider warning.
test_credentials: N/A — open tool, no auth required
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed evaluations and cleaned them up via DELETE at end of pytest run + post-frontend cleanup curl. Database is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest: /app/backend/tests/test_scoring_api.py (16 tests, all green). Frontend e2e covered: validation gating on info step, all 8 category steps, live score, override warning logic (backend tested), submit -> result navigation, radar chart, sub-factor table, dashboard search/filter/delete. Print/PDF uses native window.print() — button presence verified, did not invoke. Cleanup script: curl /api/evaluations?q=TEST_ then DELETE each.
rca of the issue: No critical issues found. App behaves per spec — all 16 backend tests passed, all UI flows work, override rule correctly implemented in both backend and frontend (verified mathematically: 100% scores with availability or owner forced to 1/5 -> tier 1 score, can_instant_book=false, override_reason set).
